text:
The 287 th Hunter Exam Site Restaurant is a restaurant named Meshidokoro Gohan (めしどころ ごはん, Meshidokoro Gohan—lit. "A Place To Eat Meals") that is located in Tsubashi Street. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 5 

Overview

The restaurant was used as the illusive starting point of the 287th Hunter Exam. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

The Kiriko son leads the three Hunter Candidates, Gon, Kurapika, and Leorio to 2-5-10 Tsubashi Street. Upon arriving at their destination, the three mistake a large building as the exam site, but are corrected by the Kiriko son who points out to them that the Meshidokoro Gohan restaurant beside was the true exam site. Leorio questions if the Kiriko son was joking with them as there's no way so many Hunter applicants could be packed in there. The Kiriko son confirms the location is the exam site as a conspicuous site would draw too much attention. 

When the group enters the restaurant, the chef welcomes them and asks for their order. The Kiriko son orders a steak combo, and when the cook asks if it should be grilled or boiled, he responds that it should grilled under a low flame. With that, the cook prepares the meal, and a waitress leads the group to a back room where their meal is prepared. There, the Kiriko son claims the probability of a rookie Hunter Candidate reaching as far as they did. Before taking his leave, the Kiriko son wishes them good luck and to look him up next year. 

The room then starts to descend as Leorio munches on the steak, pondering what the Kiriko's son meant by his last comment, thinking they won't pass the exam. Kurapika chimes in and claims that Hunters typically pass the exam on their third try, while talented ones pass on their first try. It's stated that many rookie applicants crack under the pressure of the tests, while veterans crush others. Hearing this makes Gon curious as to why so many people want to become Hunters if the trial to become one is so difficult. The question prompts Leorio and Kurapika to debate the aspirations of becoming a Hunter, where Leorio notes its lucrative nature, and Kurapika cites its noble nature. When Gon is asked what being a Hunter is to him, he answers as a career, but is cut off as the room reaches the final floor at the beginning of the underground tunnel. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 2011 anime adaptation, Kurapika explicitly tells Gon that the steak combo order was only the password for access to the room and that no actual steak combo will come. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 3 (2011)
